source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for operational UI with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, tabular seasonal metrics, and compact alpine status dashboards.
layout: 8px grid, seasonal segmented controls, compact status rails, snowfield surfaces, granite separators, speckled texture accents, and adaptive winter/summer states.

prompts.label: Transparent ptarmigan motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one ptarmigan bird, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: alpine tundra ptarmigan in seasonal plumage, compact rounded grouse body, mostly snow-white winter feathers with warm brown mottled back and flanks, fine black-brown speckles, small dark eye, short dark bill, feathered feet, natural rock-and-snow neutral coloration, precise plumage texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full bird visible, do not crop the beak, tail, wings, legs, or feathered feet. Calm side-facing posture.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white feather detail, brown speckles, and soft down texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second bird, no shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for Ptarmigan
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a motif-driven UI theme named Ptarmigan, derived from alpine tundra ptarmigan plumage: snow white feathers, warm brown seasonal mottling, black-brown speckles, pale granite rock, blue-gray snow shadow, and muted lichen accents.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: seasonal mode system, adaptive winter/summer state controls, quiet alpine operations UI, white fields with brown speckle texture, granite dividers, compact status rails, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style components, 8px radius cards.
Required visible sections: title "Ptarmigan", motif story, palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top navigation, seasonal mode segmented control, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small status donut, data table, form fields, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: snowfield background #f4f1e9, feather white cards #fffdf7, rock ink #2f2b25, ptarmigan brown primary #8d6645, speckle umber #5f4835, snow shadow blue-gray #aab8bd, lichen sage accent #7f8f72, granite border #c9c6bc, alpine gold warning #b99a52, berry red destructive #a94f45.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic product UI labels such as Seasonal Mode, Winter, Summer, Alpine Ops, Tasks, Status, Checkpoint, Forms, Table, Analytics, Search, Ready, Pending, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no unrelated bright colors, no purple or blue gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for Ptarmigan
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode version of the Ptarmigan design-system board. It must feel like the same alpine seasonal mode system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference style: alpine tundra ptarmigan plumage: snow-white highlights, warm brown mottling, black-brown speckles, pale granite rock, blue-gray snow shadow, muted lichen sage, and deep alpine dusk neutrals.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: dark alpine workspace, seasonal mode system, adaptive winter/summer state controls, dense but readable operations UI, soft snow highlight edges, brown speckle texture, granite separators, compact status rails, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls, 8px radius cards.
Required visible sections: title "Ptarmigan Dark", motif story, dark palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top navigation, seasonal mode segmented control, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small status donut, data table, form fields, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: alpine dusk background #26241f, dark rock panels #312c25, snow text #f4f1e9, feather white highlights #fffdf7, ptarmigan brown primary #b58a62, speckle umber #8d6645, snow shadow blue-gray #aab8bd, lichen sage accent #8f9b7a, muted granite borders, alpine gold warning #c3a45c, berry red destructive #bd665c.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic product UI labels such as Seasonal Mode, Winter, Summer, Alpine Ops, Tasks, Status, Checkpoint, Forms, Table, Analytics, Search, Ready, Pending, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated bright colors, no purple or blue gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.
